commit.message:
Fix game hang by correcting CPU branch timing

Branch taken (+1) and page-crossing (+2) cycle penalties were lost because
branch() incremented this.cycles but execute() overwrote it with the base
cost. Use a branchPenalty field that gets added after execute() returns.
Also remove temporary debug instrumentation from PPU and NesEmulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add component diagram in draw.io format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game hang after screensaver by delivering APU frame counter IRQs to CPU

The APU's isIrqPending() was never checked in the main loop, so games
relying on APU IRQs for timing (e.g. Double Dragon & Battletoads) would
spin indefinitely waiting for an interrupt that never fired.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add APU implementation for sound support

Implement NES Audio Processing Unit with pulse, triangle, and noise
channels, wired into the CPU bus and main emulation loop. Audio output
uses javax.sound.sampled at 44100 Hz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix game freeze after title screen by adding NMI edge detection, PRG RAM, and DMA NMI handling

- Trigger NMI immediately when game enables NMI via PPUCTRL while VBlank is active
- Add 8KB PRG RAM at $6000-$7FFF so game state reads/writes work correctly
- Check for NMI during DMA transfer to avoid missing VBlank interrupts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: critical hit/miss emphasis and color-coding in combat console

- attackNarrative: CritSuccess → "*** CRITICAL HIT! ***" with damage; CritFailure → "*** CRITICAL MISS! ***"
- buildNarrative (firearm/cast paths): same emphasis pattern
- RenderCombatEvent: crit hit → BrightYellow; crit miss → BrightRed; normal hit → Red; miss → BrightWhite
- Also: player session resistances/weaknesses populated at login from ComputedDefenses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix empty-looking vertical bar chart — reduce height and boost bar proportions

The "Expected Monthly LSA Leads by Budget" chart had a 280px container
with the smallest bar at only 15%, creating a large void above the bars.
Reduced container to 180px and adjusted bar heights (28/50/72/100%)
to fill the space more effectively while preserving relative proportions.

feat: auto-provision cert and kubeconfigs for setup page in every deployment

- bootstrap: add extract_workshop_ca_cert() — scans cert-manager/Traefik
  secrets, falls back to generating a self-signed CA if none found; runs
  before deploy_cert_setup_page() so the cert is always available
- bootstrap: add create_kubeconfig_secret() — packages auth/*.conf files
  as k8s Secret (nkp-kubeconfigs) in nkp-lab-manager namespace
- deployment.yaml: mount nkp-kubeconfigs Secret at /app/kubeconfigs/;
  set KUBECONFIG_PATH env var to workload01.conf (optional: true so pod
  starts even before secret exists)
- setup.py: add _extract_ca_from_cluster() k8s-client fallback — if
  ConfigMap cert is absent, scans cluster secrets and caches result in
  /tmp; error message now guides deployers to run bootstrap

commit.message:
Fix re-exec for brew symlink installs, bump to 0.3.1

execv(argv[0]) fails silently when argv[0] is a bare command name
(no path) since execv doesn't search PATH. Brew installs use a
symlink, so users run it as just "anemll-profile". Use
_NSGetExecutablePath() for reliable re-exec with execvp fallback.

commit.message:
Fix keyboard: use TextBox as focus proxy with handledEventsToo

Grid/Panel cannot receive keyboard focus in WinUI 3 (only Control
subclasses can). Replace the Button proxy (which consumed Enter/Space)
with an invisible TextBox, wire handlers via AddHandler(handledEventsToo)
to intercept all keys, and delay Focus() to run after layout completes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: version.js top-level await killed entire app on live site

version.js is gitignored (generated). Cloudflare served a text/html
404 page for it. Browsers enforce strict MIME checking on ES modules:
text/html is rejected. The top-level await on the rejected import
crashed the module evaluation, killing ALL JavaScript. No data loaded,
no onboarding, no error shown - just an empty shell.

Fix: replace top-level await with fire-and-forget .then().catch().
The version string is cosmetic - it must never block or crash the app.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive audit — 18 security, GL, franchise, and reliability fixes across 131 files

* fix: close 4 remaining audit issues from v2 review

1. VoidExpenseDialog — replace direct book_transactions.insert() with
   postExpenseVoidToGL() from gl-posting.ts so expense voids go through
   the centralised GL function (balance validation, proper account
   lookup via getCachedAccount, consistent source_type tagging).

2. supabase/config.toml — enable verify_jwt = true for all admin and
   authenticated user-facing edge functions (admin-impersonate,
   admin-data, admin-list-clients, admin-override-plan,
   admin-custom-packages, admin-list-tickets, ai-bookkeeper,
   aura-helper, ada-chat, ada-extract, categorize-expense,
   generate-aura-insights, generate-insights, process-csv-import,
   process-document, process-migration, suggest-catalog-items,
   update-aura-memory, calculate-royalties, reconcile-match,
   create-connect-account, check-connect-status, create-connect-payment,
   create-checkout, customer-portal, check-subscription,
   generate-blog-cover, blog-ai-writer).
   Webhooks, cron jobs and public portal auth endpoints remain false.

3. App.tsx — restore /dashboard/estimates route to render the
   Estimates page component instead of redirecting to /dashboard/invoices.
   Estimates.tsx exists and has its own full UI; the redirect was
   silently hiding it from users.

4. calculate-royalties — remove balance_owing from INSERT/UPDATE
   (it is a GENERATED ALWAYS AS column and cannot be set directly).
   GL posting errors are now logged persistently to royalty_gl_errors
   table instead of only to console, enabling ops-team remediation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: close 10 issues from comprehensive v3 audit

GL Posting — CRITICAL
1. postEntries(): reject entries with null account_id before inserting.
   Previously, if getCachedAccount() returned null for any account (revenue,
   AR, expense, AP, cash, tax), GL rows were written with account_id = NULL,
   creating orphan journal entries that break financial reports.

Security — CRITICAL
2. stripe-webhook: separate signature verification (→ 400) from event
   processing (→ 200). Previously, a DB error during processing returned
   HTTP 400, causing Stripe to retry indefinitely. Also unify env var
   naming: try STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET first, fall back to
   STRIPE_CONNECT_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

3. admin-delete-account: block deletion of other platform_admin /
   super_admin users (must revoke admin role first). Cancel active Stripe
   subscriptions via API before deleting local records to prevent
   orphaned billing.

4. process-reminders: HTML-escape all template variables (client_name,
   business_name, invoice_number, etc.) before interpolating into email
   HTML to prevent stored XSS via customer/business names.

5. admin-impersonate + SupportModeBanner: return admin_user_id in the
   impersonation response and store it in sessionStorage so the exit
   audit log uses the real admin UUID (was incorrectly using auditLogId).

Franchise — HIGH
6. FranchiseTeamInviteAccept: add .eq("invite_status", "pending") to the
   UPDATE WHERE clause as an optimistic lock — prevents race condition
   where two concurrent sessions can both accept the same invite.

7. FranchiseeConnectFlow: re-validate invitation expiry at connection
   time (it may have expired between validation and the user clicking
   Connect). Also block self-referential franchising where a franchisor
   connects their own business as a franchisee of their own network.

Validation — HIGH
8. BillDialog: require at least one line item with a description and an
   amount > $0 before saving. Previously, bills could be created with
   $0 subtotal and no line items.

Performance — MEDIUM
9. Add 4 missing indexes: book_transactions(account_id),
   time_entries(project_id), recurring_schedules(business_id),
   franchise_royalty_payments(location_id, status).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: close all remaining audit items — transactional deletes, idempotency, rate limits, console guards

1. admin-delete-account: transactional deletion via DB RPCs
   Created admin_delete_business() and admin_delete_user_data() PL/pgSQL
   functions that wrap all cascading deletes inside a single transaction.
   The edge function now calls these RPCs instead of sequential JS-level
   deletes, preventing partial-deletion states on mid-flight failures.

2. process-recurring-invoices: atomic idempotency guard
   Replaced the read-then-check pattern (last_processed_date === today)
   with an atomic UPDATE...WHERE last_processed_date != today that acts
   as a compare-and-swap. If two cron instances fire concurrently, only
   one can claim each schedule — the other sees 0 rows and skips.
   Also made CRON_SECRET mandatory (was previously bypassed if the env
   var was unset).

3. refresh-retained-earnings: added mandatory CRON_SECRET validation
   This function had ZERO authentication — anyone who knew the URL could
   trigger a full retained-earnings recalculation for every business.
   Also added to config.toml with verify_jwt = false (cron job).

4. client-portal-auth: rate-limited generate and regenerate actions
   Both actions already had JWT + CSRF + business-ownership checks, but
   lacked IP-based rate limiting. Added a 20-requests-per-15-minutes
   throttle using the portal_auth_attempts table (same mechanism as the
   validate action).

5. console.error DEV guards (113 calls across 93 frontend files)
   Wrapped all unguarded console.error() calls in src/ with
   if (import.meta.env.DEV) to prevent internal error details, stack
   traces, and Supabase error objects from leaking to browser consoles
   in production. Calls that already had a user-facing toast alongside
   were intentionally left as-is.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
